name: Oat Catalog
description: A lightweight A2UI catalog pairing Google's A2UI protocol with Kailash Nadh's Oat CSS library. Defines 37 semantic HTML components, 10 registered client-side functions, and theme properties mapped to Oat CSS custom properties.

Row.description: Horizontal flex container that lays out children in a row.

children.description: Ordered list of child component IDs rendered inside the row.

justify.description: Horizontal alignment of children along the main axis.

align.description: Vertical alignment of children along the cross axis.

Column.description: Vertical flex container within a grid row. The weight property maps to Oat's 12-column grid (col-1 through col-12).

children.description: Ordered list of child component IDs rendered inside the column.

justify.description: Vertical alignment of children along the main axis.

align.description: Horizontal alignment of children along the cross axis.

weight.description: Column span in the 12-column grid (1-12). Maps to Oat class col-{n}.

Grid.description: 12-column responsive grid container. Wraps children in an Oat container and row structure.

children.description: Ordered list of child component IDs (typically Column components) rendered inside the grid.

columns.description: Number of grid columns (1-12). Defaults to 12.

gap.description: Gap between grid cells (CSS length value).

List.description: Ordered or unordered list that renders children as list items. Supports template-based rendering for data-bound arrays.

children.description: Ordered list of child component IDs rendered as list items.

template.description: Template component ID used to render each item in a data-bound array.

direction.description: Layout direction of the list. Vertical renders as a standard list; horizontal renders inline.

ordered.description: If true, renders as an ordered list (ol). Defaults to false (ul).

Sidebar.description: Side navigation panel rendered as an aside element. Supports collapsible behavior and left/right positioning.

child.description: Component ID of the sidebar content.

position.description: Which side of the viewport the sidebar appears on.

collapsible.description: Whether the sidebar can be collapsed by the user.

Text.description: Text display component supporting headings (h1-h6) and paragraph variants.

text.description: The text content to display. Supports data binding.

variant.description: Semantic HTML element used for rendering.

Image.description: Displays an image with optional fit and variant styling.

url.description: Image source URL. Supports data binding.

fit.description: CSS object-fit value controlling how the image fills its container.

variant.description: Visual style variant for the image.

width.description: Width of the image (CSS length value).

height.description: Height of the image (CSS length value).

Icon.description: Displays an icon by class name. The renderer applies the icon as a CSS class on a span element.

name.description: Icon identifier or CSS class name.

Divider.description: A horizontal or vertical rule used to separate content.

axis.description: Orientation of the divider. Defaults to horizontal.

Badge.description: A small status indicator or label rendered as a span with data-badge attribute.

text.description: Badge text content. Supports data binding.

Avatar.description: Displays a user avatar image or initials fallback.

url.description: Avatar image URL. Supports data binding.

initials.description: Fallback initials displayed when url is not provided. Supports data binding.

Skeleton.description: A placeholder skeleton loader displayed while content is loading.

width.description: Width of the skeleton element (CSS length value).

height.description: Height of the skeleton element (CSS length value).

variant.description: Shape variant of the skeleton placeholder.

Progress.description: A progress bar indicating completion of a task.

value.description: Current progress value. Supports data binding.

max.description: Maximum value of the progress bar. Defaults to 100.

Meter.description: A meter gauge for displaying a scalar measurement within a known range.

value.description: Current meter value. Supports data binding.

low.description: Upper boundary of the low range.

high.description: Lower boundary of the high range.

Video.description: Embedded video player rendered as a semantic video element.

src.description: Video source URL. Supports data binding.

poster.description: Poster image URL shown before playback. Supports data binding.

controls.description: Whether to display playback controls. Defaults to true.

muted.description: Whether to start muted. Required for autoplay in most browsers.

alt.description: Accessible description of the video content.

AudioPlayer.description: Embedded audio player rendered as a semantic audio element.

src.description: Audio source URL. Supports data binding.

controls.description: Whether to display playback controls. Defaults to true.

Button.description: An interactive button that triggers an action when clicked.

child.description: Component ID of the button's label content.

variant.description: Visual style variant of the button.

action.description: Action to execute on click (server event or function call).

checks.description: Validation checks to run before executing the action.

TextField.description: A text input or textarea for collecting user input.

label.description: Label text displayed above or beside the input.

value.description: Current input value. Supports two-way data binding.

variant.description: Type of the text input. 'textarea' renders a multi-line input.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text displayed when the field is empty.

action.description: Action to execute on value change or submit.

required.description: Whether the field is required for form validation.

CheckBox.description: A checkbox input for boolean or multi-select values.

label.description: Label text displayed beside the checkbox.

value.description: Data model path for the checkbox state. Supports two-way data binding.

action.description: Action to execute on state change.

Switch.description: A toggle switch input rendered as a checkbox with role='switch'. Styled by Oat CSS.

label.description: Label text displayed beside the switch.

value.description: Data model path for the switch state. Supports two-way data binding.

Slider.description: A range slider input for selecting a numeric value within a range.

value.description: Current slider value. Supports two-way data binding.

action.description: Action to execute on value change.

DateTimeInput.description: A date and/or time picker input.

value.description: Current date/time value as ISO 8601 string. Supports two-way data binding.

enableDate.description: Whether to enable the date picker. Defaults to true.

enableTime.description: Whether to enable the time picker. Defaults to false.

action.description: Action to execute on value change.

ChoicePicker.description: A selection component rendered as a dropdown select or radio group depending on configuration.

options.description: Array of selectable options, each with label and value.

value.description: Value submitted when the option is selected.

selections.description: Data model path for the currently selected value(s). Supports two-way data binding.

maxSelections.description: Maximum number of selections allowed. 1 = single select (dropdown), >1 = multi-select (checkboxes/radio group).

action.description: Action to execute on selection change.

Autocomplete.description: A text input with floating autocomplete suggestions powered by floatype.js.

source.description: URL or data model path for autocomplete suggestions. Supports data binding.

minChars.description: Minimum number of characters before suggestions appear. Defaults to 2.

value.description: Current input value. Supports two-way data binding.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text displayed when the field is empty.

action.description: Action to execute when a suggestion is selected.

Card.description: A content container rendered as an article or section element.

child.description: Component ID of the card content.

title.description: Optional card title. Supports data binding.

Modal.description: A dialog overlay rendered using the native HTML dialog element. The entry point child is the trigger element; the content child is the dialog body.

trigger.description: Component ID of the trigger element that opens the modal.

content.description: Component ID of the modal body content.

dismissible.description: Whether the modal can be dismissed by clicking outside or pressing Escape.

Tabs.description: A tabbed interface rendered as an oat-tabs web component. Each tab has a title and a child component.

tabs.description: Array of tab definitions, each with a title and child component ID.

child.description: Component ID of the tab panel content.

activeTab.description: Index of the initially active tab. Supports data binding.

Accordion.description: A collapsible content panel set using details/summary elements. Supports grouped mode where only one panel is open at a time.

items.description: Array of accordion panel definitions, each with a title and child component ID.

title.description: Summary text displayed in the accordion header.

child.description: Component ID of the panel content.

grouped.description: When true, only one panel can be open at a time (exclusive mode).

Tooltip.description: A tooltip that appears on hover, rendered using Oat's data-tooltip attribute.

child.description: Component ID of the element that triggers the tooltip on hover.

text.description: Tooltip text content. Supports data binding.

position.description: Position of the tooltip relative to the trigger element.

Dropdown.description: A dropdown menu rendered as an Oat dropdown web component. Displays a trigger element that reveals a list of actions or options.

child.description: Component ID of the trigger element that opens the dropdown.

items.description: Array of dropdown menu items, each with a label and action.

label.description: Display text for the menu item.

action.description: Action to execute when the item is selected.

disabled.description: Whether this menu item is disabled.

position.description: Position of the dropdown menu relative to the trigger.

Table.description: A data table with column definitions and template-based row rendering. Supports sorting and striped styling.

columns.description: Array of column definitions with header labels and data keys.

key.description: Data key for the column, used to extract cell values from row data.

rows.description: Data model path to the array of row data objects. Supports data binding.

sortable.description: Whether the table supports column sorting.

striped.description: Whether to apply alternating row striping.

Pagination.description: A navigation component for paging through data sets. Renders as a nav element with page links.

currentPage.description: The currently active page number. Supports data binding.

totalPages.description: Total number of pages. Supports data binding.

action.description: Action to execute when a page is selected (typically a fetchPage function call).

Alert.description: An alert message banner for displaying status information to the user.

text.description: Alert message text. Supports data binding.

variant.description: Visual style variant indicating alert severity.

dismissible.description: Whether the alert can be dismissed by the user.

Toast.description: A temporary notification rendered as an oat-toast web component. Automatically dismisses after a duration.

text.description: Toast message text. Supports data binding.

duration.description: Auto-dismiss duration in milliseconds. Defaults to 3000.

position.description: Screen position where the toast appears.

Breadcrumb.description: A breadcrumb navigation trail rendered as a nav with aria-label='breadcrumb'.

items.description: Ordered array of breadcrumb items, each with a label and optional action.

label.description: Display text for the breadcrumb link.

action.description: Action to execute when the breadcrumb is clicked (typically navigateTo or openUrl).

OatHTML.description: Escape hatch component that renders sanitized HTML. For semi-trusted agents that need layout flexibility beyond catalog components. The HTML string is passed through a configurable sanitizer before DOM insertion.

html.description: Sanitized HTML string to render. Supports data binding. Processed through DOMPurify or equivalent before insertion.

sanitize.description: Whether to sanitize the HTML before rendering. Defaults to true. Should only be set to false in fully trusted environments.

fetchPage.description: Client-side pagination. Fetches the next page of data from a URL using cursor-based pagination and writes the result to the data model.

url.description: API endpoint URL. Supports data binding.

cursor.description: Data model path or value for the pagination cursor. Supports data binding.

targetPath.description: JSON Pointer path in the data model where fetched data will be written.

method.description: HTTP method for the request. Defaults to GET.

fetchAndAppend.description: Infinite scroll data loading. Fetches additional data and appends it to an existing array in the data model.

url.description: API endpoint URL. Supports data binding.

cursor.description: Data model path or value for the pagination cursor. Supports data binding.

targetPath.description: JSON Pointer path to the array in the data model where results will be appended.

method.description: HTTP method for the request. Defaults to GET.

subscribeSSE.description: Opens a Server-Sent Events stream and writes each event's data to the data model for real-time updates.

targetPath.description: JSON Pointer path in the data model where event data will be written.

eventName.description: SSE event name to listen for. Defaults to 'message'.

subscribeWebSocket.description: Opens a WebSocket connection and writes parsed messages to the data model for real-time updates.

targetPath.description: JSON Pointer path in the data model where parsed messages will be written.

messageParser.description: How to parse incoming messages. 'json' parses as JSON; 'text' writes raw string. Defaults to 'json'.

openUrl.description: Opens a URL in the browser. Standard A2UI navigation function.

url.description: URL to open. Supports data binding.

target.description: Browser target for the URL. Defaults to '_blank'.

navigateTo.description: Client-side SPA routing via tinyrouter.js and window.history. Navigates to a path without full page reload.

path.description: Route path to navigate to. Supports data binding.

params.description: Optional route parameters passed to the route handler.

showToast.description: Triggers a toast notification using the Oat Toast web component.

text.description: Toast message text. Supports data binding.

duration.description: Auto-dismiss duration in milliseconds. Defaults to 3000.

debounce.description: Wraps another action with a debounce delay. Useful for search-as-you-type inputs to avoid excessive requests.

delayMs.description: Debounce delay in milliseconds. Defaults to 300.

formatDate.description: Locale-aware date formatting using Intl.DateTimeFormat. Writes the formatted string to the data model.

value.description: Date value to format (ISO 8601 string or data model path). Supports data binding.

locale.description: BCP 47 locale string (e.g., 'en-US', 'de-DE'). Defaults to browser locale.

formatNumber.description: Locale-aware number formatting using Intl.NumberFormat. Writes the formatted string to the data model.

value.description: Number value to format or data model path. Supports data binding.

locale.description: BCP 47 locale string (e.g., 'en-US', 'de-DE'). Defaults to browser locale.

primaryColor.description: Primary action and accent color. Maps to CSS variable --color-primary.

backgroundColor.description: Page and surface background color. Maps to CSS variable --color-bg.

textColor.description: Default text color. Maps to CSS variable --color-text.

fontFamily.description: Base font stack. Maps to CSS variable --font-family.

borderRadius.description: Component corner radius. Maps to CSS variable --border-radius.

spacing.description: Base spacing unit for margins and padding. Maps to CSS variable --spacing.

mode.description: Color mode preference. Applied as a data attribute on the surface root element. 'auto' follows the user's OS preference via CSS media queries.
